synopsis: Luke Skywalker returns to Tatooine for the first time since leaving with Obi-Wan Kenobi, tasked with recruiting blockade-runner pilots to help the Rebel Alliance evacuate its base on Yavin 4. While there he stumbles on clues to a secret scheme of the House of Tagge working with the Empire, though not enough to reveal what they are planning. He continues on to Mos Eisley and reunites with Han Solo and Chewbacca in the very cantina where they first met months earlier. The reunion is cut short when Fixer arrives to warn Luke that the Empire knows he is on Tatooine and is actively hunting him.
title: Star Wars (1977) #31: Return to Tatooine
